{{Quote|I am a Mandalorian scout. I don't go on patrols.|Kelborn|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Kelborn''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior under the command of [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Mandalorians want to be tested to the limits of our abilities and beyond. We admire anyone who beats us on the battlefield. Instead of hate we study, practice and train until the next time, so we won't be beaten. But some young Mandalorians find this a hard lesson. Any veteran of the Mandalorian Wars respects Jedi like you. Your actions on Dxun validate this.|Kelborn, to [[Meetra Surik]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />}}
Kelborn was discovered by [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]] while [[Mercenary/Legends|working]] as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] on frontier worlds. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was one of the greatest warriors of the clan, and [[Meetra Surik]] sought to prove herself to the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] by battling Kelborn in the [[Battle Circle]] after helping him [[Death/Legends|kill]] Onderon Scouts.

As the second in command of the reunited Mandalorian forces, he answered to no one except for Mandalore himself. Kelborn wore the [[Color/Legends|red]] Mandalorian Sergeant Armor. Surik helped him eliminate some scouts from [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] sent by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Tobin (Human)|Tobin]] to kill her so that they would not discover the Mandalorian base's location. Later, the two dueled in the [[Battle Circle|battle circle]], using dueling [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]],<ref name="KOTOR 2 Prima Official Guide">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> and Surik won.

Soon after, [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith Assassins]] [[Skirmish on Dxun|attacked]] the camp, and Kelborn participated in the ensuing battle. He cloaked himself and crept up behind two Sith assassins, attacking and killing both of them instantly with a [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibrosword]], before fighting other Sith. He was then put in charge of the Mandalorians while Mandalore accompanied Surik.

Later on, Kelborn received a message from [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kavar]] on Onderon, that the Onderon civil war had started, and sent a comm message himself to Surik, who rushed to Onderon to aid [[Talia (Onderon)|Queen Talia]], and the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], in defeating [[General/Legends|general]] [[Vaklu]] and his Sith allies on both [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]] and Onderon.

==Equipment==
Kelborn, like many other Mandalorians on Dxun, was known to wear a [[Stealth field generator/Legends|stealth field generation belt]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
